name: Dinner Rolls-For Bread Machine
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the order specified for the bread machine.
2. Select the sweet bread/manual cycle on the breadmaker.
3. Allow the dough to knead and rise once.
4. Using greased hands, pinch off pieces of dough and place them on a cookie sheet sprayed with non-stick spray.
5. Let the rolls double in size.
6. Bake for 15-18 minutes at 350°F.
